content.en:
"Senior of the Great Sun King Monkey, I'm going to try it at the Gate of the Extreme Dao!"

Ye Tian said.

"You're going to the Gate of the Extreme Path, as I just said, it's a waste of opportunity for you to go now!" said the Great Sun King Monkey.

"I'll just try, three chances anyway!"

Ye Tiandao.

"Stupid!" The Great Sun King Monkey was very angry, thinking that Ye Tian was too stupid.

However, Ye Tian really wanted to enter the Gate of the Extreme Dao, and he couldn't dissuade him.

Immediately.

Ye Tianzhen shuttled to the Gate of the Extreme Dao.

At this moment, many of the super-perfect controllers of the Extreme Dao creatures looked at Ye Tian one after another.

However, there is no extreme creature to attack Ye Tian, it may be that he is afraid of the Great Sun King Monkey, after all, Ye Tian has just communicated with the Great Sun King Monkey, who knows if he will offend the Great Sun King Monkey because of this?

Wow!

Ye Tian came to the Gate of the Extreme Dao in an instant, and then entered the Gate of the Extreme Dao.

......

Rumble!!!

The pressure of the Extreme Dao hit, and Ye Tian instantly released the power of the Extreme Dao to protect his whole body.

At this time, he saw an extreme golden path that spread all the way to the depths of time and space in the middle of nowhere.

"This is the Extreme Golden Path, with my Extreme Path attainments, I should be able to step into the thousandth step!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

The time and space that each Extreme Dao creature came in should be different, so Ye Tian didn't see any Extreme Dao creatures, so he wouldn't be snooped on by other Extreme Dao creatures.

Airplanes!

Ye Tian stepped into the first step of the Extreme Dao Golden Road, which was said to be a step, but it was actually a huge platform, enough to accommodate any Extreme Dao creature.

Ye Tian protected himself with the extreme path of the sword, and when he reached the sixty-third step, he was a little struggling.

After all, his Sword Extreme Dao had only just been realized, and he was very weak, and he couldn't go far at all just by relying on the Sword Extreme Dao.

"It seems that those Extreme Creatures have little hope of breaking through to the thousandth step!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

So, he once again performed a kind of extreme way—the spatial extreme way.

After protecting himself with the Sword Pole Dao and the Space Pole Dao, Ye Tian took some more steps.

Next, with each step he walked, Ye Tian blessed more extreme powers.

Time passed slowly, and Ye Tian gradually stepped into the hundredth, second, and third hundredth steps......

Unconsciously, Ye Tian was very close to the thousandth step.

"In this way, I have no problem stepping into the thousandth step, and even the second thousandth step is not a big problem!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

Soon, he finally reached the position of the thousandth step.

At this time, a large amount of Extreme Dao Golden Light poured in, entered Ye Tian's body, and began to refine his will.

Airplanes!

Ye Tian's will was quickly tempered and improved, and the Extreme Golden Light not only increased the quantity, but also the quality.

"Oh my God, the effect of the Extreme Dao Golden Light is much better than the Blue Zero Liquid, who arranged the Gate of the Extreme Dao?" Ye Tian was very curious.

He felt that the Lord of the Ancient Dynasty would not be able to arrange such an Extreme Golden Path, because the Lord of the Ancient Dynasty did not have this kind of Extreme Golden Light!

At this moment, Ye Tian really felt that the Extreme Dao Deep Sea behind the Extreme Dao Source Sea was not simple.

"The Lord of the Ancient Realm should know about the Extreme Dao Deep Sea, but I can't ask either, after all, with my strength, it is impossible to touch the Extreme Dao Deep Sea, and there is no way to explain it!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

Time passed slowly, and Ye Tian's will was gradually improved, and the speed of improvement was too fast.

The will of the Void Sparrow is increased, which is equivalent to the will of other copied bodies is also increased.

This time, there were not many Extreme Golden Lights, but the effect was too good, and Ye Tian slowly refined these Extreme Golden Lights.

And in the outside world, many Extreme Dao creatures were shocked.

Because there is a special golden light fluctuation in the Gate of the Extreme Dao, this means that there is an Extreme Way creature that has stepped into the thousandth step and obtained the Extreme Golden Light Descending.

"Who stepped into the thousandth step of the Golden Path of the Extreme Dao?"

Many Extreme Dao creatures wondered.

In their cognition, those Extreme Creatures who entered the Gate of the Extreme Path should have little hope of stepping into the thousandth step!

The Great Sun King Monkey was also puzzled, it stands to reason that there shouldn't be an Extreme Creature breaking into the thousandth step!

Suddenly, he thought of Ye Tian.

"Impossible, the other party's strength is so weak, how can it be possible to step into the thousandth step, could it be that a certain Extreme Dao creature has recently had a great opportunity, and the Extreme Dao realm has risen sharply, deliberately hiding its strength?"

The Great Sun King Monkey guessed.

This is very likely, but he doesn't know who it is.

Because if the other party really steps into the thousandth step, he is not an opponent, where can he dare to offend the other party!

It can be said that no Extreme Dao creature doubted Ye Tian, because Ye Tian was too weak.

......

Time passed slowly, and after a long time, Ye Tian completely refined the Extreme Dao Golden Light, and both the quantity and quality of his will were greatly improved.

However, just by relying on these Extreme Dao Golden Lights, there was still no way to completely transform his will into Extreme Dao Will.

It is too difficult and too difficult to transform the will into the will of the Extreme Dao, and it takes too many of these Extreme Path treasures.

"Go ahead!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian continued to move forward, stepping through one step after another, working towards the two thousandth steps.

Gradually, Ye Tian's body was densely covered with all kinds of extreme path powers, and the power of the extreme path golden path constantly collided with Ye Tian's extreme path power, and the extreme path power kept annihilating.

It took a while, and Ye Tian finally stepped into the two thousand steps.

At this time, the gate of the Extreme Dao in the outside world once again appeared with golden light fluctuations.

"Another Extreme Creature has stepped up the thousandth step?"

"Of course, it's also possible that some Extreme Creature has stepped into the 2,000th step in one go!"

"It is impossible for an Extreme Path creature to step into the two thousand steps, if there really is such an Extreme Path Creature, it would have been selected to leave the Extreme Dao Source Sea and enter the Extreme Dao Deep Sea last time, and it is impossible for it to stay here. This is the prison, and who wants to stay here?"

"It's too much to say that the prison is a prison, this is also our place of birth, if we didn't have it, we wouldn't be born!"

"Hmph, in my opinion, it's a prison, and it restricts us and doesn't let us fight!"

"That's also to make sure that the weak Extreme Dao creatures can grow safely. "

"Then why don't you restrict those cultivators who are super-perfect masters?"

"It is said to be an agreement between the perfect controllers of the Extreme Realm, and we are not qualified to care about it!"

This time, no one doubted Ye Tian anymore, and even the Great Sun King Monkey didn't have this idea in his mind, because it was something that couldn't exist.

However, this time it was still Ye Tian's movement!

On the top of the two thousand steps, Ye Tian once again received the Extreme Dao Golden Light, and the number of Extreme Dao Golden Light was several times that of before.
